name: Ares Real Estate Income Trust Inc.
summary: Ares Real Estate Income Trust Inc. is a Maryland corporation offering shares of common stock (Class S-PR, Class D-PR, and Class I-PR) through a private placement exempt from Securities Act registration under Regulation D Rule 506(b). The company operates as a real estate income trust, selling shares at NAV-based transaction prices through a dealer manager network, and operates a distribution reinvestment plan (DRIP) for stockholders.

products.name: Class S-PR Shares
products.description: Common stock shares offered via private placement at NAV-based transaction price.

products.name: Class D-PR Shares
products.description: Common stock shares offered via private placement at NAV-based transaction price.

products.name: Class I-PR Shares
products.description: Common stock shares offered via private placement at NAV-based transaction price.

products.name: Distribution Reinvestment Plan (DRIP)
products.description: Plan allowing stockholders to automatically reinvest cash distributions into additional shares.

partnerships.description: Prior dealer manager for the Offering under agreement dated August 2, 2024; consolidated into AMCM effective January 2, 2026.
New dealer manager for the Offering effective January 2, 2026, following consolidation with AWMS.
